## Deleted Files
- All .tar.gz archive files (12 files)
- Complete out/ directory with API dumps

## Updated .gitignore
Added comprehensive ignore rules for:
- .claude/ - Claude Code configuration
- .dart_tool/ and **/,dart_tool/ - Dart tooling
- build/ and **/build/ - Build outputs
- ui_screen/ - UI screens directory
- **/.env.server - Server environment files
- **/*.sh - Shell scripts
- out/ - Output directory

This keeps the repository clean and focused on source code only.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
